subcodes.first_line: O flame of the love of God! Such is the excellence of regard and surpassing affection that His Holiness Abú'l-Faḍá'il beareth toward your honoured self that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله محبت الله حضرت ابی الفضائل را نچنان حسن توجه و فرط محبت بانجنابست که
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
